posts.caption:
Just got back from an unforgettable holiday in the Dolomites! The hikes and MTB rides through the stunning mountains were absolutely breathtaking. 🌄🚴‍♂️

📣 I’ve had many messages these days from clients and friends ask about these incredible places, so I’m excited to announce that I’ll be organizing my exclusive retreats FirMeMore here in May and August 2025! If you’re interested in joining, you can sign up for more info on my website in my bio, just drop your email and stay tuned for all the details. Let’s explore it together! 🌲✨

#AltaBadia #Dolomites #FitMeMore #AdventureAwaits #Retreat2025 #Hiking #EMTB #FitnessRetreat"

posts.caption:
This is @jimmybrixton ’s transformation ✨ 
And what you see here is the result of dedication, consistency and trust in the process.

Jimmy didn’t just “work out” — he followed every workout plan, respected the diet, tracked his progress, checked in, and actually used the app the way it’s meant to be used.

Logging sessions, staying interactive, asking questions, adjusting when needed — that’s what made the difference.

I’m genuinely proud of the effort he put in.
These results are earned, not given.

Well done Jimmy 👏🔥

#transformation #coachingresults #onlinecoaching #fitnessapp

posts.caption:
Just wrapped up my Hyrox race in Milan! Although I missed my target time due to a minor calf issue, I’m thrilled with how much I improved from my last race. ☺️ This time, I competed solo instead of in a double team as originally planned, which required a last minute shift in strategy and conditioning. It was a tough but rewarding challenge! 💪

For anyone out there looking to improve their Hyrox performance, whether you’re going solo or double, I offer online coaching tailored to your needs. Feel free to reach out if you’re interested in tips on how to boost your training and get race-ready!

#hyrox #hyroxitalia #hyroxtraining #hyroxworld

posts.caption:
In 10 days, we rise above the noise.

The Dolomites will be our playground, our training ground, and our sanctuary.
With Fit Me More, you’ll move with purpose, breathe with presence, and share the journey with an incredible group of like-minded people.

4 days to step away from chaos and into clarity.
Strength. Stillness. Nature’s power.

📍 Dolomites, Italy
📅 10 days to go

#retreat #dolomites #fitnessretreat

posts.caption:
One of my favorite client transformations! 🙌 Watching this journey has been incredible, proof that real progress happens with consistency and the right plan. 💪

I offer 1:1 personal training in London and online coaching through my app: custom workouts, progress tracking, and support wherever you are!

Ready to start your transformation? DM me today! 🚀

#FitnessTransformation #PersonalTrainingLondon #OnlineCoaching #NewYearNewYou

posts.caption:
🇬🇧🇮🇹 Yesterday, I had the most unforgettable experience at my British citizenship ceremony in London, celebrating my dual nationality journey! It's been a while since I last posted on Instagram, but this momentous occasion called for a special update! 

I'm not just becoming a British citizen, I'm also proudly Italian! 🇮🇹🍕🍷 So, consider this post a double celebration of cultures and traditions. From embracing the elegance of London to savoring the flavors of Italy, my heart is filled with gratitude for the privilege of calling two incredible countries home. Thank you all for your endless support as I navigate this exciting journey.🥂 #BritishAndItalian  #CheersToTheQueenAndPizza (Yes, she's in my photo too!) 😂👑🍕

posts.caption:
1:01:40 • surprisingly a 7th place our category — and proud of every second.
Today was the first time I truly felt how well the Hyrox Relay format matches my characteristics: explosive power, speed, and quick recovery between stations.
I hit every target I set for myself and enjoyed the race from start to finish.
I couldn’t ask for a better mentor than @oliverblackpt 🙌 and the energy from my teammates @geoffclementpt  @bretonluke made the whole experience next level. 💪
On to the next challenge. 🔥
#hyroxrelay #raceday #hyroxlondon

posts.caption:
📸 Congratulations to Paolo on his incredible body transformation! 🎉 In just 6 months, he has made remarkable progress, going from 105 kg to a fantastic 91 kg! 💪

👶 Being a dad didn't stop Paolo from taking charge of his health and well-being. Inspired by his little one, he embarked on a journey to transform his lifestyle. With a balanced and sustainable diet and the customized workout plans I created for him, he has achieved outstanding results training from home! 🏋️‍♂️

Keep up the amazing work, Paolo! 👏

My Online Personal Training plans are available on my website or slide into my DMs to know more about it! 💪

#BodyTransformation #HealthyLifestyle #DadBodNoMore #FitnessJourney

posts.ownerFullName: Enrico Argentin - London PT / Online Coach

posts.caption:
What a journey. ✨⛰️ 

This edition of Fit Me More Retreat in the Dolomites is officially in the books and what an incredible success it was.
4 days of training, hiking, ice baths, breathwork, and chef-prepared meals… but above all, 4 days of connection.

With almost 1,000 photos and videos, one thing stands out: the people.
This group of amazing, like-minded souls made the retreat unforgettable: pushing limits, finding clarity, and building friendships that will last long after the mountains.

I couldn’t be more grateful for the energy everyone brought. 
This was more than a retreat: it was a reset, a transformation, and the beginning of something bigger.

🔥 Fit Me More is just getting started.

replies.text: @sebastseb next time you can’t miss it 🤩

latestComments.text: The retreat sounds transformative, blending challenge, connection, and reflection perfectly. Which moment or experience do you feel captured the essence of this journey the most? :)

posts.caption:
Last weekend’s Hyrox competition was a true test of strength and endurance, but I found myself smiling through the challenges. 💪☺️
Huge shoutout to my run partner @kiki_christian_8_1 , who jumped into the PRO division training just 2 weeks prior with a training plan made by me, a bit crazy, but oh so epic! 🏃‍♀️💪 

Also thanks @oliverblackpt that he motived us along the way and shared some precious experience tips and let’s not forget those epic shirtless pic celebrations you couldn’t resist jumping into! 🌟 

Meeting new faces and pushing our limits made it a weekend to remember. 🩵

#Hyrox #FitnessJourney #NewChallenges #hyroxcoppenhagen #hyroxworld #hyroxuk

posts.caption:
FIT ME MORE | DOLOMITES RETREAT 2025 🏔️✨
📍 Dolomites, UNESCO World Heritage, Italy
📅 August 22-26, 2025 (UK Summer Bank Holiday Weekend)

This isn’t just another fitness retreat—it’s an experience. 🚀

✔ 5 days / 4 nights in luxury accommodation
✔ Daily fitness sessions & guided hikes
✔ Mobility & breathwork workshops
✔ Ice bath recovery sessions
